name: Shrimp and Vegetable Saute, Chinese Style (Mf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the anchovy paste, soy sauce, sugar, chicken broth, and season with dried red pepper flakes.
2. In a large skillet or wok, heat the vegetable and sesame oils over medium heat.
3. Add the peppers and scallion whites to the pan and stir-fry for one minute until they begin to soften.
4. Add the shrimp and continue stirring for another minute until they are just starting to turn pink.
5. Add the garlic and stir-fry for 15 seconds, or until you can smell its aroma.
6. Pour in the liquid ingredients (soy sauce mixture) and add the peas, half of the mint and basil leaves. Stir gently and allow everything to simmer for one to two minutes, or until the shrimp are cooked through and the vegetables are tender but still crisp.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed. Transfer the sauteed shrimp and vegetable mixture to a bowl. Serve over rice and garnish with the remaining mint, basil, and scallion rounds.
